lohagarh-fort-resort.heroSubtitle: Lohagarh Fort Resort — Where Royal Dreams Take Shape
lohagarh-fort-resort.intro:
Lohagarh Fort Resort and Spa is a luxurious destination located in the heart of Rajasthan, India. This resort is the perfect venue for a fairy tale royal wedding. The fort-like architecture of the resort gives a majestic feel to the entire event. If you are looking for the best wedding resort in Jaipur, you are at right place. 
 The resort offers a wide range of services and amenities to make the wedding celebrations a memorable experience for the guests. The lush green lawns and gardens of the resort provide an ideal setting for outdoor ceremonies. The resort also has a grand banquet hall that can accommodate a large number of guests. 
The resort’s experienced staff and planners help to organize every detail of the wedding, from decorations to catering and entertainment. The resort also offers luxurious accommodation for guests, with rooms and suites featuring traditional Rajasthani decor and modern amenities. 
Overall, Lohagarh Fort Resort and Spa is the perfect destination for couples who want to celebrate their special day in a regal and luxurious setting. It is the perfect blend of modern comfort and traditional charm, making it an ideal choice for a fairy tale royal wedding.

venues.name: Swaagat kaksh
venues.description: Swaagat Kaksh creates a remarkable first impression for our guests. This elegant space provides a welcoming atmosphere for arrivals and departures, ensuring a seamless check-in and check-out experience.

venues.name: Maharaja Bagh
venues.description: With its breathtaking views of the Aravalli Valley, the majestic Maharaja Bagh at Lohagarh Fort Resort provides the perfect setting to celebrate your special day. This grand outdoor venue exudes regal elegance and offers a picturesque backdrop for unforgettable celebrations.

venues.name: Maharani Bagh
venues.description: Immerse yourself in regal luxury at our spectacular venue, where endless possibilities await to create your extraordinary celebration. With a plethora of options, guests can design their epic events in a truly magnificent setting.

venues.name: Krishna Angan
venues.description: Escape to the breathtaking beauty of Krishna Angan, where the majestic Aravalli Hills provide a stunning backdrop for life's celebrations, including the varmala ceremony. This picturesque venue is the perfect destination for enchanting wedding receptions and unforgettable moments.

venues.name: Jal Mandap
venues.description: Picture a serene spot where nature's elements unite to create magic. Exchange vows beneath a majestic sacred fig, surrounded by tranquil water. At the Jal Mandap, water symbolizes purity, while the ancient Pipal tree exudes timeless elegance. This sacred tree is 300 years old. This enchanting setting harmonizes Earth, Water, Fire, Air, and Space, elevating your celebration to extraordinary heights. It's not just a wedding; it's a remarkable union at a resort that transcends the ordinary, where every element conspires to create an unforgettable experience of love amidst nature's splendor.
venues.highlight: Royal indoor banquet for all weather

venues.name: Flower Valley Garden
venues.description: Discover a secluded and private space within the resort but away from the main site , where you can host your exclusive celebrations. Surrounded by nature , with mountains in close proximity , it offers a truly enchanting setting.

venues.name: Sheesh Mahal
venues.description: Experience the mesmerizing beauty of Sheesh Mahal, a magnificent space adorned with intricate mirrors and regal architecture. This opulent addition to our resort is ideal for grand celebrations, ensuring your wedding becomes truly unforgettable.

venues.name: Aravalli View Garden
venues.description: Perched at the highest point of the resort, Overallview Gardens commands sweeping vistas of Jaipur's skyline and the Nahargarh hills. This terraced garden venue is ideal for sunset ceremonies, romantic engagements, and destination wedding receptions.

venues.name: Maharaja Surajmal Banquet Hall
venues.description: We take pride in presenting the Maharaja Surajmal Banquet Hall, a grand venue perfectly suited for hosting lavish gatherings and celebrations. With a capacity to accommodate 300-400 guests in theater seating, 250 in cluster seating, and up to 500 guests in a floating arrangement, this banquet hall embodies luxury and sophistication, making it an ideal choice for royal weddings and other significant events.

faqs.q: Is Lohagarh Fort Resort a good destination wedding resort in Jaipur?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Lohagarh Fort Resort is one of Jaipur's premier destination wedding venues, offering 8 distinct venues, on-site luxury accommodation, award-winning catering, and end-to-end wedding coordination.

faqs.q: What is the best wedding venue for large gatherings in Jaipur?
faqs.a: Palace Valley Lawns, with a 10,000 sq ft capacity for 800+ guests, is our largest and most versatile venue for marquee weddings.

faqs.q: Does Lohagarh offer wedding planning services?
faqs.a: Yes. Our dedicated wedding team provides complete planning support — from decor and catering to entertainment, photography, and logistics.
Our outdoor venues are at their best from October to March. For summer and monsoon celebrations, we recommend our indoor banquet MF Mumtaz or can arrange climate-controlled tent structures.

faqs.q: Can we customise the wedding decor and theme?
faqs.a: Yes. We work with leading decorators and offer personalised theme consultations — from traditional Rajasthani to contemporary luxury and fusion styles.

the-lohagarh-palace.heroSubtitle: The Lohagarh Palace — A Timeless Celebration
the-lohagarh-palace.intro: The Lohagarh Palace in Bharatpur stands as a testament to royal Rajput heritage. With its magnificent architecture, manicured lawns, and regal interiors, it is the perfect setting for wedding celebrations that echo the grandeur of a bygone royal era.

venues.name: Darbar Lawn
venues.description: The centrepiece of the palace grounds, Darbar Lawn is a sweeping open lawn with a stunning palace facade as its backdrop. Ideal for grand ceremonies and receptions under the open sky.

venues.name: Sheesh Mahal Banquet
venues.description: Named after the iconic mirror-work palace tradition, Sheesh Mahal Banquet is an air-conditioned hall adorned with mirror inlay work, ornate ceilings, and royal furnishings — creating a fairytale setting for gala dinners.

venues.name: Baradari Gardens
venues.description: A classic Rajput Baradari-style garden with 12 arched pavilions surrounding a central water feature. The Baradari Gardens create a romantic, symmetrical setting perfect for pheras and cocktail evenings.

venues.name: Zenana Courtyard
venues.description: The intimate Zenana Courtyard, once reserved for royal ladies, is now an exclusive venue for haldi, mehendi, and small bridal events. Its hand-painted walls and floral niches create a uniquely feminine, artistic ambience.

faqs.q: What makes The Lohagarh Palace unique for weddings?
faqs.a: The palace's authentic Rajput architecture, heritage interiors, and lush grounds create an unmistakably royal atmosphere that is unique to a genuine historical property.

faqs.q: How far is the palace from Bharatpur city centre?
faqs.a: The Lohagarh Palace is located within Bharatpur, easily accessible from the railway station and major highways.

faqs.q: Does the palace offer on-site guest accommodation?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer a range of heritage rooms and suites within the palace complex for wedding guests.

kothi-lohagarh.intro: Kothi Lohagarh is an intimate boutique property set in a restored colonial-era kothi with lush private gardens. It is the ideal venue for intimate destination weddings and private family celebrations that demand personalised royal service.

venues.name: Rose Garden
venues.description: A charming walled garden filled with heritage roses and seasonal blooms. The Rose Garden is perfectly suited for intimate ceremonies, cocktail evenings, and mehendi functions with a romantic, fragrant ambience.

venues.name: Kothi Terrace
venues.description: A stunning rooftop terrace with 360° views of Jaipur's Pink City skyline. The Kothi Terrace is perfect for intimate sunset ceremonies, rooftop dinners, and exclusive cocktail parties with an unparalleled city backdrop.

venues.name: Durbar Hall
venues.description: The restored Durbar Hall retains original colonial-era features: high ceilings, period chandeliers, and terrazzo floors. It accommodates intimate wedding dinners and ceremonies with old-world charm.

faqs.q: Is Kothi Lohagarh suitable for small destination weddings?
faqs.a: Yes — Kothi Lohagarh specialises in intimate, personalised weddings for up to 180 guests, ensuring every guest receives exclusive royal hospitality.

faqs.q: Can we book the entire property exclusively?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Exclusive buyout packages are available for full privacy and dedicated service throughout your celebration.

townhall.intro: Townhall Restaurant & Events is Jaipur's premier venue for sophisticated urban celebrations. With contemporary design, award-winning cuisine, and versatile event spaces, it offers a stylish setting for modern weddings and corporate celebrations.

venues.name: The Grand Hall
venues.description: The Grand Hall is a contemporary banquet space with soaring ceilings, state-of-the-art AV systems, and modular flooring. Perfect for large wedding receptions, corporate gala dinners, and themed events.

venues.name: Sky Terrace
venues.description: The Sky Terrace is Townhall's signature outdoor event space — a chic rooftop setting with panoramic city views, open bar capability, and a relaxed lounge setup ideal for cocktail receptions and pre-wedding parties.

venues.name: Private Dining Suite
venues.description: An exclusive private dining suite ideal for intimate rehearsal dinners, family lunches, and VIP wedding events. The suite features premium furnishings, a dedicated butler, and personalised menu curation.

faqs.q: Does Townhall cater for both weddings and corporate events?
faqs.a: Yes. Our versatile spaces are designed to accommodate both social weddings and large corporate events with equal sophistication.
We offer in-house catering from our award-winning restaurant kitchen, with customisable menus spanning Indian, Continental, and fusion cuisines.
